title: Welcome to Create: Arise
description:
Thank you for downloading the §lCreate: Arise§r modpack! 

This popup you are seeing is from the questing mod you will be using in this Modpack, called §lQuestlog§r.

You can find the Questlog by clicking the §lbook icon§r in the top left of your inventory or by checking the assigned hotkey in the keybinds. (default: [^] or [´])
